## Checklist

- [ ] `skill validate` passes for all modified skills
- [ ] `skill lint` passes with no errors
- [ ] SKILL.md frontmatter is complete (name, description, version)
- [ ] Scripts are tested and documented
- [ ] .skillignore excludes dev-only files
- [ ] Gallery entry updated (if adding a new skill)
